name: phase1-smoke-test
title: Phase 1 smoke test sticky note
hook: Verify the memory inbox accepts and files a sticky note end-to-end
body:
This is a synthetic sticky note used to validate the Phase 1 layout. The memory-writer job (Phase 2) should pick this up, write `.kody/memory/phase1-smoke-test.md` with a `type: lesson` frontmatter, add an INDEX.md line, and delete this file.

If you are reading this in the repo, Phase 2 has not yet run — that's expected.
